chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Acquittal Appeal No.395 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For orders as to non-prosecution --------------------------------------------- 18.04.2025 This criminal acquittal appeal was filed on 09.05.2024 and it was first time fixed before this Court on 18.12.2024 but the matter was adjourned due to non-appearance of the appellant as well as his counsel. Today, the office has fixed this matter for orders as to non-prosecution. Neither the appellant nor his counsel is in attendance, which shows that they have lost interest to pursue the instant appeal, the same is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
